nl_query: For each active scanner device, show the device name, campus, total scripts scanned this month, number of rescans performed, average OCR confidence of pages scanned, and the timestamp of the last scan, filtering devices with zero scans.
failed_sql: SELECT sd.device_name, au.name AS academic_unit, COUNT(DISTINCT sh.script_id) AS total_scripts_scanned, COUNT(DISTINCT sh.id) AS rescans_performed, AVG(sp.extracted_metadata->>'confidence') AS average_ocr_confidence, MAX(sh.scanned_at) AS last_scan_timestamp FROM scanner_device sd JOIN academic_unit au ON au.id = sd.campus_id JOIN scan_history sh ON sh.device_id = sd.id JOIN script_page sp ON sp.script_id = sh.script_id WHERE sd.is_active = TRUE AND sh.scanned_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 month' GROUP BY sd.device_name, au.name, sd.id, sh.device_id, sh.id, sp.script_id, sh.scanned_at HAVING total_scripts_scanned = 0 ORDER BY average_ocr_confidence DESC LIMIT 10;
